case_title: MEISELMANN, PETER VIKTOR VS RICHTER-ROBB PACIFIC INSURANCE SERVICS,INC. C/O S et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO JOHN SPIEGEL RETURNED SIGNED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MEISELMANN, PETER VIKTOR AS TO DEFENDANT RICHTER-ROBB PACIFIC INSURANCE SERVICS,INC. C/O S C/O SPIEGEL, JOHN R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEISELMANN, PETER VIKTOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RICHTER-ROBB PACIFIC INSURANCE SERVICS,INC. C/O S C/O SPIEGEL, JOHN R. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
